hypothesis: Systems-optimizer promotable cards become more deterministic if their scope-local evaluation_bundle must match the exact five-command promotion bundle in the declared order, rather than merely including those commands as a superset.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` treated the scope-local promotion bundle as an inclusion check, so a seeded or kept card could append extra commands, duplicate required commands, or reorder the bundle and still verify clean. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any promotable systems-optimizer card whose `evaluation_bundle` differs in order, length, or membership from the exact five-command scope-local promotion bundle, while the declared promotion bundle remains green on the current state.
keep_rule: Keep only if seeded and kept systems-optimizer cards must use the exact five-command scope-local promotion bundle with no extras or duplicates and the fixed promotion bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Scope-local promotion bundles must stay exact for promotable systems-optimizer cards; superset or reordered bundles silently widen the proof surface beyond the bounded slice.
